creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

> could this be committed to the project Git?

If you commit it ? I have no idea how to commit it to the git
repository for dtc.

> Also, sbox should be updated if possible, since it
> gives chroot capabilities to all virtualhosts. And
> dtc/admin/remount_aufs should also be adapted to
> any union filesystem available in FreeBSD if
> possible, plus a system to bootstrap a chroot
> system should be created.

What exactly do you mean with "sbox" ? Is it the software that
is described on

http://stein.cshl.org/software/sbox/

?

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                         9 years to go !
